prompt: Let's design the technical architecture for digital waivers. PRD and scope doc are in plans/.

assertions.text: Reads PRD and scope doc before asking questions — references specific FRs, user stories, or scope decisions
Covers all 10 technical domains: architecture, data/state, core behavior, edge cases, integration, operational, security, testing, code design, phased build
Design references specific rangeops files, patterns, and conventions (schema patterns, service layer, auth, existing models)
Adversarial review runs automatically after design — delivers Ready/Revise/Rethink verdict with strengths and issues
Design maps back to PRD requirements — FRs and user stories referenced in behavior specs or build phases
Design doc has key sections: Decisions Log, Data Models, Behavior Specs, Edge Cases table, Phased Build Plan with acceptance criteria
Suggests /plan as next step when Ready
Glossary conditions checked — generates if needed, uses canonical terms in data models
